title: asterothamnus centrali-asiaticus var. centrali-asiaticus
intro: Asterothamnus centrali-asiaticus var. centrali-asiaticus, also known as the Central Asian or "Asterothamnus", is a flowering plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Asterothamnus centrali-asiaticus var. centrali-asiaticus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Asterothamnus centrali-asiaticus var. centrali-asiaticus typically involve its flowers and leaves being used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
